description: Engram retrieval benchmark — ground-truth query set for measuring R@k and NDCG. Grading prefers (expected_type, expected_item_id) when set; expected_title_contains is kept for readability and title-only fallbacks.

categories.exact_error: Query contains exact or near-exact error text; FTS5 should dominate.
categories.semantic_similar: Query is semantically related but uses different vocabulary; semantic search should dominate.
categories.tag_filter: Query names a technology; tag matching should boost relevant results.
categories.type_inference: Query implies a memory type via keywords (mistake/pattern/skill).
categories.multi_hop: Correct result requires combining context from the query and entry metadata.

queries.query: fetching roles in a loop database slow
queries.notes: N+1 query — different words, same concept

queries.query: N+1 query ORM lazy loading
queries.notes: Key terms appear verbatim in seed mistake

queries.query: useEffect missing dependency array infinite loop
queries.notes: React hook mistake — exact terms

queries.query: React component re-renders forever
queries.notes: Same mistake, user says 're-renders' not 'infinite loop'

queries.query: AI agent overwrote my file
queries.notes: Indexed mistake title = first 80 chars of text; 'overwriting' may be past the cut — use 'entire file'.

queries.query: full-file replace instead of targeted edit
queries.notes: Same; ground truth substring matches the mistake title field.

queries.query: race condition async requests frontend
queries.notes: Race condition pattern — tags include async, frontend

queries.query: UI shows wrong data clicking rapidly
queries.notes: Symptom description — should match race condition pattern

queries.query: frontend blank screen no error API field null
queries.notes: Silent failure pattern — described by symptom

queries.query: schema validation API contract drift
queries.notes: Pattern has tags: api, schema, validation

queries.query: how to run a database migration safely
queries.notes: 'how to' → type_inference should detect skill

queries.query: deploy schema change production without downtime
queries.notes: Same skill, different vocabulary

queries.query: debugging steps for a bug stack trace
queries.notes: 'debugging' → type_inference + skill keyword match

queries.query: investigate error without immediately guessing the fix
queries.notes: Same skill, described from the workflow perspective

queries.query: AbortController fetch cancel in-flight requests
queries.notes: Standard fix term appears verbatim in pattern

queries.query: commit message terse short format
queries.notes: Git commit skill

queries.query: code review pull request findings
queries.notes: 'review' keyword

queries.query: Zod Pydantic validate API response
queries.notes: Standard fix tools named in pattern

queries.query: architecture decision multiple stakeholders workflow
queries.notes: Committee workflow skill

queries.query: token efficient terse response system prompt
queries.notes: Caveman skill — paraphrased
